ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation run */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size used in the simulation */,
  "cov_prob" REAL /* Coverage probability of the simulation */,
  "cov_prob_se" REAL /* Standard error of the coverage probability */,
  "int_width" REAL /* Interval width of the simulation */,
  "int_width_se" REAL /* Standard error of the interval width */,
  "nSims" INTEGER /* Number of simulations performed */,
  "p" REAL /* Parameter p used in the simulation */,
  "censoredp" REAL /* Censoring probability used in the simulation */,
  "scale" REAL /* Scale factor used in the simulation */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date the simulation was run */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used in the simulation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who ran the simulation */,
  "simulation_description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation run */,
  "simulation_status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "simulation_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the simulation run */,
  "simulation_version" TEXT /* Version of the simulation configuration */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for categorizing simulations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Current version of the model */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "param_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., numeric, categorical) */,
  "param_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_parameters_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., coverage probability, interval width) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of the result (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "result_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the result value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the model version (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model parameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "param_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "param_status" TEXT /* Status of the parameter (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "param_source" TEXT /* Source of the parameter value (e.g., default, user-defined) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
